scope.placement_coverage: the same one fixed named-label placement per profile used by ../second_center_query
scope.search: incidence CEGAR with exact equality-ideal no-good cuts

encoded: all incidence, Q-C-negation, critical-blocker-system, cap-profile, and named-label constraints of ../second_center_query
all squared-distance equalities of every proposed supplied/global row
the normalized coordinate gauge point 0=(0,0), point 1=(1,0)
monotone pruning by row subsets whose equality ideal is independently cross-checked UNIT
bounded deterministic incidence DFS with a node cap and a fixed CEGAR round cap
omitted_fail_closed: all other named-label placements and orbit representatives
pairwise distinctness except for the normalized 0/1 gauge
strict convexity, orientation inequalities, and geometric cap order beyond the fixed cyclic shadow
minimum-enclosing-circle, non-obtuse, circumscribed-Moser, and unencoded liveData geometry
arbitrary equal-distance pairs not represented by proposed rows
a real witness when an equality ideal is merely NONUNIT over the complex variety
a replayed Nullstellensatz certificate or independently certified finite-search proof
a same-cap producer theorem or Lean proof

verdict_policy.note: No outcome is exhaustive over card 12, target-faithful, or a proof of the producer.
